---
pagetitle: "Presentations"
listing:
  contents:
    - "presentations/*.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date"
  template: presentations/presentations.ejs.md
  fields: [title, date, time, speakers, discussant, description]
---

::: {#sponsors_banner .g-col-12 .title}
# Presentations
:::


::: {.g-col-12 .full_text_block style="min-width: 640px; max-width:1080px; margin: 20px auto"}

:::: {#listing}
::::

:::
